('4) $, 7 ^ 5 (15) RT RR fRR ^3717 i 4. 3L "^1.3TI. 393 (3f), cTPTS 16 T f H , 2007 STO 3Tf^7*fr£RT 3#I?R W^ C^RTTRTt«n) f=PW, 2007 ^' f ^ W 1 ^ [TPI.TI.T^V. i/6/2006-y.^4k] 5THQT ^ffrq, ^fg^r ^rfe fea(JU| ; _ j p - p f ^ q nroT^7"TRrq7i, gRTr!?!^^^'. ^ I . ^ I R . 34(aT),-ar&Bi 10TPWt,2006"5RT y^lfyidfER^TC, ^t afk «#RT^rr^i.-^.^T.R. 470(3T),TfRRg 10 3R^i,2006 sfii^i.man. 393(sr),wns; 16^ra,2007"gra^PKI"^RI5??S TmTlRl^TiTRn-KfT I 4179 G1/2007 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THKGAZFTT] OI INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II— SK_ 3UU_ MINISTRY OT COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department fff Commerce i NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th October. 2007 G.S.R. 1744(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section55 of the Special Economic Zones Act, 200: (28 of 2005). the Central Government herebv makes the following rules to further amend the Special Economic Zttnes Rules, 2006. namely :— ]. (]) These rules may be called the Special Economic Zones ( Second Amendment > Rules. 2007: (2) they shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2 In the Special Economic Zones Rules, 2006 (hereinafter referred to as the principal rules), in rult 5. in sub-rule (2), for clause (a j the following clause shall be substituted, namely:— "(a) A Special Economic Zones for multi-product shall have a contiguous area of one thousand hectart or ronre but not exceeding 5000 hectares : Provided thai in case a Special Economic Zone is proposed to be set up in Assam. Meghalaya, Nagaiand. Arunachal Pradesh, Mizoram, Manipur, Tnpura. Himachal Pradesh, Utiaranchai. Sikiam. Jammu and Kashmir. Goa or in a Union Territory, the area shall be two hundred hectares or more : Provided further that at leas; fifty per ceni of the area shall be earmarked for developing the processing area.". 3. In the principal rules, in.ruie 18. in sub-rule (4), clause (g) shall be omitted. 4 In the Special Economic Zones (Second Amendmemj Rules, 2007, notified vide number S.0.393(E) dated the 16th March, 2007, m sub-rule (1) of rule 1, for the brackets and words "(Second Amendment)'', the brackets and words "(Amendment)" shall be substituted. [RNo.F.l/6/2006-SEZ] ANIL MUKIM. Jt. Secy. Note:—The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number G.S.R. 54(E). dated the 10th February.. 2006 and subsequently amended vide notification number G.S.R. 4"?0(E) dated the 10th August, 2006 and number S.O. 393(E) dated the 16th March, 2007.
